description: Sent to the submitter when their idea's stage transition is blocked by gate requirements
subject: [G42 SaaS Factory] Action Needed — {{idea_name}}
body:
Action Needed on Your Idea

Dear {{submitter_name}},

Thank you for your submission "{{idea_name}}". After reviewing your idea, we identified a few outstanding items that need to be addressed before we can proceed.

Outstanding Items

{{blocked_reason}}

Idea{{idea_name}}
Current Stage{{previous_stage}}

Please work with the SaaS Factory team to address these items. Once completed, your idea will move forward in the review process.

Best regards,
G42 SaaS Factory Team

You are receiving this because you submitted this idea to the G42 SaaS Factory Board.
